capabilities.description: Core AI interaction cycle: processes text or voice input, retrieves memory, and generates an LLM response.
capabilities.verification_step: Submit any prompt via CLI or WebUI and verify the AI responds.

capabilities.description: Dynamic switching between AI 'Souls' or personalities, affecting system prompt and behavior.
capabilities.verification_step: Press F3, select a personality, verify config.json updates.
capabilities.notes: Accessible via F3 shortcut in CLI.

capabilities.description: Switching between AI backends (Ollama, Kobold, Cloud) and selecting specific local models.
capabilities.verification_step: Press F2, switch model, check if backend connects successfully.
capabilities.notes: Accessible via F2 shortcut in CLI. Impacts performance.

capabilities.description: On-the-fly modification of AI behavior using the /istruzione or /instruction commands.
capabilities.verification_step: Type /istruzione test, check if AI follows 'test'.

capabilities.description: Access to long-term memory, identity profiles, and chat history. Includes Tabula Rasa protocol.
capabilities.verification_step: Ask 'Who am I?', verify system reads identity from vault.
capabilities.notes: Resetting memory clears episodic chat databases.

capabilities.description: Text-to-Speech conversion using Piper or System engines. Toggleable output.
capabilities.verification_step: Press F5, check status bar voice indicator toggles ON/OFF.
capabilities.notes: F5 toggle. Can be directed to Local or Web UI.

capabilities.description: Speech-to-Text conversion using System/Faster-Whisper engines. Toggleable listening.
capabilities.verification_step: Press F4, check status bar mic indicator toggles ON/OFF.

capabilities.description: Manual activation of the microphone via hotkey (Ctrl+Shift) or F8 toggle.
capabilities.verification_step: Press F8 to enable PTT, verify voice is only captured while holding hotkey.

capabilities.description: Real-time ASCII terminal interface with hardware telemetry and system status bar.
capabilities.verification_step: Run application, check if CLI status bar and header appear correctly.
capabilities.notes: Main interaction point for the user.

capabilities.description: Strumenti di rete avanzati: tracciamento IP locale e pubblico, mappatura LAN (ARP), latenza (ping) e manipolazione DNS per evasione blocchi regionali.

entry_points: AI Function Calling tramite get_network_info, set_dns_servers, ecc.

capabilities.verification_step: Chiedere: 'Qual è il mio IP pubblico?' o 'Cambia i miei DNS su Google' (dovrebbe richiedere avvio come amministratore).
capabilities.notes: Le funzioni di modifica DNS richiedono privilegi di Amministratore di sistema.

capabilities.description: Native Browser Interface (localhost:7070) providing Chat and Configuration panels.
capabilities.verification_step: Navigate to http://127.0.0.1:7070/chat to verify UI loads.
capabilities.notes: Syncs with the Core system state.

capabilities.description: Standalone GUI and CLI menus for editing detailed system configuration (config.json).
capabilities.verification_step: Press F7, verify config menu opens, change a value and verify reload.
capabilities.notes: F7 shortcut. Reloads system after save.

capabilities.description: Dynamic documentation system listing active commands and module explanations.
capabilities.verification_step: Press F1, verify dynamic list of all installed plugins appears.

capabilities.description: Hardware monitoring (GPU VRAM, CPU Load, RAM) and AI backend status verification.
capabilities.verification_step: Ask AI 'Qual è lo stato delle risorse?', verify telemetry response.

capabilities.description: Generates AI images from text prompts using Pollinations or Airforce APIs.
capabilities.verification_step: Ask AI 'Genera un'immagine di un gatto', verify file saved in data/images/.

capabilities.description: Capability to list, count, and read files from the local filesystem.
capabilities.verification_step: Ask AI to read a harmless file, verify output matches file content.

capabilities.description: Direct execution of shell commands through the AI brain.
capabilities.verification_step: Ask AI to run 'echo TEST', verify 'TEST' is logged or spoken.
capabilities.notes: Requires user oversight. Full terminal access.

capabilities.description: Smart home device control simulation and status reporting.
capabilities.verification_step: Ask AI to turn off the lights, verify JSON simulation response.

capabilities.description: Hardware volume control and audio mute/unmute functions.
capabilities.verification_step: Ask AI to mute system volume, verify OS mute state changes.
capabilities.notes: Directly interacts with OS audio mixers.

capabilities.description: Takes snapshots via the connected webcam for environmental awareness.
capabilities.verification_step: Ask AI to take a picture, verify snapshot saved in snapshots/ folder.

capabilities.description: Engages an unstructured roleplay session bypassing tool restrictions.
capabilities.verification_step: Enable roleplay via /roleplay on/off command.

capabilities.description: Generates images from text using Pollinations or Airforce APIs.
capabilities.verification_step: Instruct AI to draw an image or use /image prompt command.
capabilities.notes: Configuration previously in config.json, now isolated in config_media.json.

capabilities.description: Immersive scenario management: loading characters and scenes for AI interaction.
capabilities.verification_step: Ask AI to list default roleplay characters, verify list is accurate.

capabilities.description: Process monitoring tool to prevent duplicate instances and manage Zentra threads.
capabilities.verification_step: Run process manager bat, verify it lists active main.py pids.

capabilities.description: Software-level system reboot to refresh configuration and plugins.
capabilities.verification_step: Press F6, verify app exits with code 42 and bat script restarts it.

capabilities.description: Full system internationalization (translations) for English and Italian.
capabilities.verification_step: Switch language in F7, verify UI prompts change to chosen language.
capabilities.notes: Affects terminal logs, UI labels, and voice responses.

capabilities.description: Legacy system tool. Root Access: terminal management, reboot, log diagnostics.
capabilities.verification_step: Send [SYSTEM: time] to AI, verify it responds with local time.
capabilities.notes: Commands: time, reboot, terminal, open:<name>, explore:<folder>, shell:<command>.

capabilities.description: Legacy web tool. Network access for Google searches and websites.
capabilities.verification_step: Send [WEB: search:Test] to AI, verify it triggers a browser search.
